chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-195 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. However, learned A.A.G. for Pakistan files statement along with parawise comments, which are taken on record. The petitioner seeks reinstatement in service as a Constable/Sepoy GD in Pakistan Rangers (Sindh), whose service was dispensed with from February 2016 vide order dated 29.02.2016 passed by the Brigadier, Sector Commander, Sector HQ Bhittai Rangers Malir HALT Karachi. This petition is pending since 2018 without any progress. The conduct of the petitioner shows that he has lost his interest to pursue the petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
